nasb.text: “Come now, and let us reason together,” Says the Lord, “Though your sins are as scarlet, They will be as white as snow; Though they are red like crimson, They will be like wool.

esv.text: “Come now, let us reason together, says the Lord: though your sins are like scarlet, they shall be as white as snow; though they are red like crimson, they shall become like wool.

cnv.text: 耶和華說：“你們來，我們彼此辯論； 你們的罪雖像硃紅， 必變成雪白； 雖紅如丹顏， 必白如羊毛。

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “来吧，我们彼此理论！ 你们的罪虽如猩红， 也必洁白如雪； 你们的罪虽如绯红， 也必白如羊毛。

csbs.text: 耶和华说： “来吧，让我们彼此理论； 你们的罪虽像朱红，必洁白如雪； 虽赤如丹红，必白如羊毛。
